items.name_en: 🌟New Embossed Logo Handbag
items.name_cn:
🌟New Embossed Logo Handbag
This handbag/tote is made with imported calf leather and features the latest 2022 embossed logo design, looking more fashionable and elegant. Features a metal triangle logo on the side. Large capacity, minimalist, and lightweight.
Dimensions: 32x24x14cm
Model: 1BG384

items.name_en: 🌟New Embossed Logo Medium Bag
items.name_cn:
🌟New Embossed Logo Medium Bag
This handbag/crossbody bag is made with imported calf leather and features the latest 2022 embossed logo design, looking more fashionable and elegant. Features a metal triangle logo on the side and a detachable adjustable shoulder strap. Simple and lightweight.
Dimensions: 25x16x10cm
Model: 1BH078

items.name_en: 🎉New Double Strap🎉1BH050 Double Strap🎉This double strap is made of imported deer leather, featuring two interchangeable and adjustable long shoulder straps. The combination of fabric webbing and cowhide is perfect 😘, versatile for different occasions and outfits 😘. Large capacity, ultra-thin design, super soft touch 🎉. Get yours now 🎉. Dimensions: Length 30cm x Height 19.5cm 🎉🎉🎉 👏👏

items.name_en: 🎉Upgraded 3-in-1🎉1BC151 👏👏 This 3-in-1 handbag is made of imported calf leather, featuring a pure handmade diamond stitching pattern design that looks unique and elegant. It can be worn as a shoulder bag or crossbody 👍👍. I love the small wallet the most; the design has been upgraded, with pockets on both the left and right sides 🙊🙊. This feminine design inspiration makes it simple, elegant, and timeless 😘😘. A bag every woman strives for perfection 😘😘. Get yours now 👏👏. Dimensions: Length 24 x Height 17 x Bottom 7cm

items.name_en: 2022 Spring New Small Nylon Shoulder Bag 1BD313 🎉🎉🎉 Prada's mix-and-match philosophy runs through its narrative language, interpreting creative designs through unique combinations of materials, silhouettes, and functions. This flap shoulder bag reinterprets the innovative Re-Nylon material, presenting a delicate and feminine silhouette. The lining process gives the bag a soft and modern look, and the adjustable leather shoulder strap allows for multiple carrying methods. Dimensions: Height 16cm * Length 11cm * Width 23cm

items.name_en: P 🌹 (Small) 🎉 New Arrival 🎉 1BD292A 🎉 This System soft lambskin shoulder bag is embellished with a triangular pattern crafted with exquisite stitching, highlighting the brand's craftsmanship. The flap design features a chain handle that evokes jewelry associations / and is detachable. The front metal-engraved logo is outlined by the iconic triangular stitching, showcasing the brand's style. Can be carried by hand / shoulder / crossbody, highly functional 👍. If you like it, get yours now 🎉🎉

items.name_en: 🎉Fluffy Hobo🎉 New arrival, imported cashmere 🎉🎉1BC204🎉 This Hobo bag uses imported cashmere, featuring a detachable fur shoulder strap and chain. It adds a touch of sexiness when worn as an underarm bag, and comes with a detachable long shoulder strap. If you like a sporty sexy style, you can crossbody carry it for a chic look. Highly functional. The best part is the small hanging charm on the strap. So beautiful 🎉🎉 A winter essential. If you love it, grab one now. Dimensions: 22L x 18H x 6W cm 🎉🎉🎉

items.name_en: 💖《 packaging》💖Ophidia series GG mini tote bag. The Ophidia series reinterprets new sizes and styles, integrating the handle and shoulder strap for versatile carrying experiences. This tote bag is crafted from beige and ebony GG Supreme canvas, featuring iconic double G accessories that add charm to the overall look. Beige and ebony GG Supreme canvas, black leather trim, gold-tone hardware. As a selected item with a Gucci Tag, this product supports NFC technology for a digital innovation experience. Cotton-linen blend lining with double G, handle (12cm high), shoulder strap (28.5cm high).

items.name_en: 💖《 packaging》💖Gucci Horsebit 1955 series small shoulder bag. To celebrate the 70th anniversary of the classic Horsebit element, the new series reinterprets the Horsebit element, cleverly incorporating dazzling crystal outer rings. This small shoulder bag is crafted from white leather with elegant and charming new elements such as crystal Horsebit, showcasing a modern temperament. White leather, gold-tone crystal accessories, cotton-linen blend lining, front detail with Horsebit, top handle, detachable leather shoulder strap (20cm high); detachable chain shoulder strap with interlocking double G (52cm high). Weight: approx. 0.7kg.

specs.rawTitle:
💖Includes full original green box packaging💖Gucci Horsebit 1955 Small Shoulder Bag. To celebrate the 70th anniversary of the classic horsebit element, the new series reinterprets the horsebit element, cleverly incorporating a dazzling crystal outer ring. This small shoulder bag is crafted in pink leather with elegant and charming new elements such as crystal horsebit details, showcasing a modern temperament. Pink leather, gold-tone crystal accessories, cotton-linen blend lining, front horsebit detail, top handle, detachable leather shoulder strap (20cm high); detachable chain shoulder strap with interlocking double G (52cm high). Weight: approx. 0.7kg.
Model: 735178.
Dimensions: 13(L) x 24(W) x 5.5cm(D).
Color: Pink/Original Leather.
Made in Italy

items.name_en: 💖Includes full original green box packaging💖Gucci Horsebit 1955 Shoulder Bag. The Gucci Horsebit 1955 series draws inspiration from archival designs, skillfully blending classic details from over sixty years ago with the essence of modern fashion, highlighting the unique charm of the horsebit. The design pattern is inspired by the brand's equestrian roots, composed of two elements: a double ring and a long strip, which has become one of the brand's highly recognizable iconic elements. Brown/Walnut GG Supreme canvas, brown leather trim, gold-tone hardware, front horsebit detail, top handle, metal chain strap.
